summary: Accepted 271 gaps after wiring one same-lineage patient/workspace conversation bundle through staff and patient shells.

gaps.detail: The patient and staff shells consume the 271 bundle through deterministic seeded projection helpers that match the command-api route contract, but they do not yet fetch the live merge query directly.
Reminder delivery, callback transport, secure-link expiry, and step-up bridges remain simulator-backed. The route family and parity law are stable, but external providers are not yet authoritative.
